patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104) with documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, postoperative anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Recent and historical laboratory abnormalities include ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L) with iron saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), and eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L) — all recorded 07/03/2023. A colonoscopy with biopsy is scheduled/performed on 02/21/2025. Multiple care teams are listed, including primary care (Hand, Hoyet A, MD) and specialists in cardiology, gastroenterology, hematology/oncology, and pulmonary medicine. Documented functional limitations include difficulty walking/stairs and difficulty with dressing/bathing on various assessments. Notable recent scores: PHQ-9 0 and PHQ-2 0 (03/28/2023). Multiple data conflicts exist for date of birth, legal sex, and tobacco use across source documents.
